item.title: Version 1.5.1
item.description:
Tracks Subsystem

A new configuration layer for dynamically coloring and managing targeted Ableton Live tracks.

  • Support for recursive color distribution across complex nested group topologies.
  • Configurable manual and automatic refresh modes to prioritize performance during rapid theme switching.
  • Unified configuration interfaces for consistent parameter mapping.

Engine Performance

  • Optimized the core execution loop to improve UI rendering consistency and reduce latency.
  • Restructured factory content initialization routines to reduce application startup time.

Automated Updates

  • Integrated a native background update pipeline for automated, transparent delivery of subsequent application releases.
